compliance_patterns.description: Activity a must exist in the process.
Activity a must not exist in the process.
Activity a must be embedded inside a loop structure.
Activity b must directly follow activity a.
If activity a occurs, activity b must eventually occur afterwards.
Activity a may only occur if activity b occurred before.
If activity a occurs, activity b must not occur afterwards.
Activity b must not occur before activity a.
Activities a and b must execute in parallel branches.
Activity a must be executed by resource r.
If activity a exceeds timeout t, activity b must execute as an alternative.
Activity a must send or produce the specified data object.
Activity a must receive or consume the specified data object.
Activity a must directly execute after condition c becomes true.
Activity a must eventually execute after condition c becomes true.
Activity a must not execute when condition c holds.
